title: SHATCHI 100 Wooden Mini Clothes Pegs Arts & Crafts Mini Clips Natural Scrapbooking Photo Small Crafts Weddings Parties Baby Showers Photos 25mm Assorted Coloured
features: PERFECT FOR YOUR CREATIVE PROJECTS: A pack of 100 mini pegs to help you embellish and enhance your wood craft projects, scrapbooks or just hang photos of your loved ones!
OLID CONSTRUCTION: To withstand even your kids’ artistic endeavors. Equipped with a sturdy metal spring, these pins are great for hanging gift cards, small notes and your kids’ drawings as well.
IDEAL SIZE: They are 1inch. each, which makes them perfect for delicate and elaborate wood craft constructions, large enough to hold the weight of a photo and small enough not to take a lot of space

DECORATIVE AND CUTE: You can glue some glitter on them in order to convert them into a whole new different decorative item that can be used in so many ways. The only thing you need to do is follow your imagination!
description: From the manufacturer 100 Wooden Mini Clothes Pegs Mini Clips 25mm Assorted Coloured Unleash your creativity with our set of 100 Wooden Mini Clothes Pegs, perfect for a wide range of artistic and decorative projects. These versatile pegs are a must-have for craft enthusiasts, scrapbook lovers, and anyone looking to add a touch of charm to their creations. Crafted with care and precision Each peg features solid construction and a sturdy metal spring that ensures they can withstand even the most imaginative endeavors of kids. Use them to hang gift cards, small notes, or proudly display your children's artwork. Measuring at just 1 inch each, these mini pegs strike the ideal balance between functionality and size. They're large enough to securely hold photos, notes, and crafts, yet compact enough not to overwhelm your projects. What sets these pegs apart is their decorative potential. Get ready to let your imagination run wild! You can easily transform them into unique decorative items by adding glitter, paint, or other embellishments. The possibilities are limited only by your creativity. With their vibrant assorted colors, these mini pegs add a pop of excitement to your projects. Whether you're creating photo displays, memo boards, or homemade magnets, these pegs are your trusted companions. Elevate your arts and crafts, scrapbooking, and DIY endeavors with this pack of 100 Wooden Mini Clothes Pegs. Let these pegs become an essential part of your creative toolkit, bringing your visions to life in a playful and colorful way. Pack of 100 Wooden Mini Clothes Pegs for crafts, scrapbooking, and decorative projects. Solid construction with sturdy metal springs for durability. Each peg measures 1 inch, striking the perfect balance between size and functionality. Transform them into decorative items with your creative touch. Vibrant assorted colors make them ideal for photo displays, memo boards, and more! Mixed Colours, Sold in Bags of 100: > 25mm Long >7mm Wide > 3mm Thick
